Sophia — Critical Math/Physics Reasoning, every step verified

Proof-carrying calculation: an answer is accepted only when every step is machine-verified (sympy symbolic equivalence + SI dimensional analysis), otherwise the system abstains (fail-closed). The research-frontier tier targets honest abstention, never “solved”. canClaimAGI: false

100%misstep-catch recall
N=29, 0% false-alarm
100%abstention integrity
N=13 open problems, 0 fabricated proofs
6difficulty tiers
L1 grade-school → L6 frontier

Validated verifier-evals (deterministic, no LLM judge)

VerifierBenchmarkNAccuracyCatch recallFalse-alarmDate
legal_citation_existslegal_citations (real-vs-fabricated HK/UK/US common-law citations)14100.0%100.0%0.0%2026-06-21
step_verifier (misstep-injection)misstep_injection (clean vs one-error math/physics derivations)29100.0%100.0%0.0%2026-06-29

Misstep catch-rate by error type

Difficulty ladder — outcome mix per tier

⚠ proposer=answer-only: a deterministic harness-validation baseline (feeds gold back). Outcome counts are illustrative, not a capability claim. Run --proposer model with ≥3 seeds for a real result.

External-style accuracy (oracle-graded)

⚠ illustrative harness baseline (answer-only). Style samples, NOT the licensed MATH/GSM8K sets — see oracle-split.md.

SetDomainNAccuracyAbstained
gsm8k-stylemath10100.0%0
math-stylemath12100.0%0
physics-stylephysics10100.0%0

Pre-registration: agi-proof/math-physics-verify/preregistration.json. Reproduce: python tools/run_misstep_bench.py, run_ladder_eval.py, run_abstention_integrity.py.
